summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ConnectJob Map Clustering and Stripe Escrow features. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend map clustering, category filters, job detail panel, escrow flow, and dashboard stats all working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in MapPage - minor React key warning

passed_tests: GET /api/jobs returns 15 jobs with pagination
Jobs have lat/lng coordinates for map clustering (15/15 jobs)
Jobs have required fields (title, category, salary)
Geo filter with lat/lng/radius works correctly
Category filter works on jobs endpoint
GET /api/payments/stripe-config returns configured:false (simulated mode)
POST /api/payments/create-intent creates simulated payment with 5% commission
Payment endpoints require authentication
GET /api/payments/my returns user payments
GET /api/stats/dashboard requires auth and returns comprehensive stats
Health endpoint returns ok status
Login with valid credentials works
Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Map page loads with Leaflet tiles and OpenStreetMap
Marker clustering displays with correct colors (green 1-4, purple 5-9, blue 10-19, amber 20+)
Cluster legend visible in bottom-left of map
Category filter chips work (Todos, Constructii, Transport, etc.)
Job count badge shows correct number (15 joburi)
Job list in sidebar updates when filter changes
Clicking job shows detail panel with escrow button
Escrow page shows payment breakdown (salary + 5% commission)
Dashboard Stats modal shows comprehensive statistics
PWA Install Prompt displays correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: MapPage has React key warning for list items - should add unique keys to cluster legend items
seed_data_creation: 15 test jobs seeded in Cluj-Napoca area with various categories and lat/lng coordinates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Map clustering feature fully implemented with react-leaflet-cluster. Stripe payments running in SIMULATED mode (no STRIPE_SECRET_KEY configured). All 5 agreed features working: Dashboard Stats, PWA Install Prompt, Advanced Search, Map Clustering, Stripe Escrow UI. Test user has 15 jobs posted and 200 RON in pending payments from test transactions.

mocked_apis.Stripe Escrow: SIMULATED - payments created with sim_ prefix when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY not set
mocked_apis.Email notifications: Console log only - no actual emails sent
